title: Buffett vs Bezos — preserve vs build
html:
Buffett vs Bezos

Stub. Investing-archetype dichotomy Yahir surfaced in 2021 10 18 diversification vs concentration: "diversification preserves wealth; concentration builds wealth." The Buffett pole (preservation, diversification, margin-of-safety) vs the Bezos pole (concentration, conviction, regret minimization). Yahir treats it as a tension to hold, not resolve.

Source summaries

  • 2021 10 18 diversification vs concentration

Connections

  • regret minimization framework
  • max effort commit · disconnected from outcome
  • the austin thesis — concentration applied

related.label: Diversification preserves wealth, concentration builds wealth
